query:
SELECT id, code, label, grade, team_type, monthly_rate_aed, sort_order, is_active FROM cpa_supervision_roles ORDER BY sort_order;
SELECT id, code, label, bua_min_sqft, bua_max_sqft, supervision_duration_months, sort_order FROM cpa_building_categories ORDER BY sort_order;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT id, code, label, grade, team_type, monthly_rate_aed, sort_order, is_active FROM cpa_supervision_roles ORDER BY sort_order;
SELECT id, code, label, bua_min_sqft, bua_max_sqft, supervision_duration_months, sort_order FROM cpa_building_categories ORDER BY sort_order;
messages: id	code	label	bua_min_sqft	bua_max_sqft	supervision_duration_months	sort_order
